name: SetMediaStream
title: SetMediaStream
syntax: SetMediaStream(panel, control, busType, channel, streamIndex, streamId[]);
description: Replaces the media stream at the specified index of the Panel Designer during runtime:
The panel is accessed by its individual panel name that is entered in the Panel Designer.

parameters.name: panel
parameters.description: Panel name, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all loaded panelsIf you open a panel the first time, the panel is loaded. If you close the panel, it remains loaded.

parameters.name: control
parameters.description: Name of the control, restricted to 128 characters."" – references all controls on the panel.

parameters.name: busType
parameters.description: Bus type of the source media stream (e.g. eCAN, eFlexRay, eEthernet, ...).Currently only bus type eEthernet is supported.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Channel number of the source media stream.

parameters.name: streamIndex
parameters.description: Target stream index of the Media Stream Control.

parameters.name: streamId
parameters.description: Stream ID of the source media stream.

description: Setting media stream from Ethernet channel 1.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
